notes: The SGR mouse report `\e[<b;x;yM`/`m` decodes to KEY_MOUSE + a getmouse MEVENT with 0-based x/y and the bstate PRESSED bit for buttons 1-3, identical to libncursesw. Not modeled (court scoped around them): timing-dependent click coalescing, lone-release suppression (ncurses drops a release with no prior press), modifier bits, and multi-event batch queueing/coalescing.
oracle_method: feed SGR mouse reports to a getch/getmouse program linked against libncurses_cabi vs libncursesw over a raw xterm pty; compare the decoded (x, y, bstate)
